response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including some Java and DLang work, but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — key requirements for this role. His contributions to Java are sparse and buried in older roles, with no evidence of IDE internals or JVM optimization work.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with exposure to multiple languages and systems
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Active contributor to testing frameworks and educational workshops on software practices
concerns: Minimal evidence of recent or deep Java/Kotlin JVM tooling experience
No demonstrated work with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise application servers
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with core IDE tooling focus
